name: instructor-management-webapp
description: Instructor management app with backend email delivery API

scripts.check:backend: node --check ./server/index.js && node --check ./server/create-app.js && node --check ./server/config.js && node --check ./server/routes/email-routes.js && node --check ./server/routes/upload-routes.js && node --check ./server/services/mailer.js && node --check ./server/services/dispatch-import-parser.js && node --check ./server/services/instructor-import-parser.js && node --check ./server/storage/email-log-store.js && node --check ./server/storage/receipt-store.js
scripts.check:frontend: node --check ./app.state.js && node --check ./app.dashboard.js && node --check ./app.instructors.js && node --check ./app.schedule.js && node --check ./app.settlement.js && node --check ./app.admin.js && node --check ./app.bootstrap.js
scripts.check: npm run check:backend && npm run check:frontend
